blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,602 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
